message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add optional path_transform parameter to loader classes in loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). This is the only file I need to touch. What file(s) does your feature need?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py. Only need this file. What's your feature touching?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both need loaders.py so a disjoint file split isn't possible here. Let's split by region instead: I will ONLY touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ (adding fallback_searchpath param), FileSystemLoader.get_source, and FileSystemLoader.list_templates - purely additive changes (new optional param + extra fallback search logic), not touching path_transform or other loader classes. You take DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader freely, and for FileSystemLoader please add your path_transform param/logic additively alongside mine without removing my fallback_searchpath code. Suggest I go first, send DONE, then you layer your changes on top (or vice versa - your call on order). Sound OK?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features require editing loaders.py (unavoidable overlap - path_transform must touch all loader classes including FileSystemLoader; fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader). To avoid clobbering: in FileSystemLoader.__init__, please add your fallback_searchpath param at the end of the signature/body (after existing followlinks) - I'll add path_transform as the very last param/line after yours. In get_source, please put your fallback-search logic as a distinct block (e.g. after the primary searchpath loop, before the final raise) - I'll only add one line at the top of get_source to transform  before use, so our blocks won't overlap textually. I'll leave FileSystemLoader mostly to you structurally and just append my small transform hook. Let me know if that ordering works, then I'll proceed with DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader entirely on my own (no overlap there).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Agreed. I'll add fallback_searchpath as the last param in __init__ signature/body (after followlinks), and my fallback-search block in get_source will go after the primary searchpath loop, before the final raise - leaving room for your one-line transform hook at the top. Proceeding now.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py

note: Both our features require editing loaders.py (unavoidable overlap - path_transform must touch all loader classes including FileSystemLoader; fallback_searchpath only touches FileSystemLoader). To avoid clobbering: in FileSystemLoader.__init__, please add your fallback_searchpath param at the end of the signature/body (after existing followlinks) - I will add path_transform as the very last param/line after yours. In get_source, please put your fallback-search logic as a distinct block (e.g. after the primary searchpath loop, before the final raise) - I will only add one line at the top of get_source to transform the template string before use, so our blocks will not overlap textually. I will leave FileSystemLoader mostly to you structurally and just append my small transform hook. Let me know if that ordering works, then I will proceed with DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader entirely on my own (no overlap there).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed - agreed split: you own FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates for fallback_searchpath (I'll only add a path_transform param + one-line transform hook at the top of get_source, additive alongside your code). I own DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader entirely. I'll wait for your DONE before touching FileSystemLoader so I layer on top of your changes cleanly; starting on the other classes now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished fallback_searchpath implementation in FileSystemLoader: added param at end of __init__ signature/body, added a distinct fallback-search for-loop in get_source right after the primary loop and before the final raise, and merged fallback_searchpath into list_templates. Tests pass (40/40 in tests/test_loader.py) plus manual verification of precedence/backward-compat. Your transform hook space at the top of get_source and end of __init__ is untouched - go ahead and layer your changes on top.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished path_transform implementation: added the param to DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader (each own __init__ and get_source/get_loader), and layered a path_transform param + one-line transform hook onto FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source per our agreed split (I didn't touch your fallback_searchpath code/region). All error messages preserve the original untransformed template name. Full test suite passes (841/841). Note: in my copy of loaders.py, FileSystemLoader still only has my changes - your fallback_searchpath edits don't appear to be present here, so we may be on separate copies; just flagging in case the final merge needs attention.
